falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any single day within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 79% bottom_2024_aug pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower lows; this proves the 'bottom' call was premature and the structure has broken bullish

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained complacency at pre-correction levels would falsify the bottom signal, as the referenced August 2024 bottom featured VIX spike-and-persist dynamics; this indicates no capitulation occurred

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while S&P 500 simultaneously trades below 5,200
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This flight-to-safety divergence with equity weakness would invalidate the pattern match, as bottom_2024_aug featured yields rising with equities (growth scare resolution); this instead signals recession/deeper bear market

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
